stemHtml: A pilot chooses to fly faster or slower than the optimum range speed in a glide. What is a possible reason for this?

options.a: Flying faster than optimum range speed in a strong tailwind sometimes increases range achieved.
options.b: Flying slower than optimum range speed in a strong tailwind sometimes increases range achieved.
options.c: Flying slower than optimum range speed will get the aircraft safely on the ground more quickly.
options.d: Flying slower than optimum range speed increases speed stability.
